$comment: KinBridge Tier 1 acute escalation payload. POST /api/v1/alerts (mock: WebSocket broadcast to dashboard channel). Example instance, doubles as schema-by-example.

transcript_excerpt.text: Ngomong-ngomong Bu, bagaimana kabar suami Ibu hari ini?
Suami saya... saya tidak ingat, siapa ya namanya?

cognitive_snapshot.$cri_derivation: 3 probes: T1 miss (w=10,s=0), T2 exact (w=3,s=1), T3 exact (w=2,s=1) -> 100*(5/15)

companion_action_taken.spoken_text: Sepertinya Ibu sudah lelah hari ini. Kita istirahat dulu ya. Mau saya teleponkan Dewi supaya Ibu bisa dengar suaranya?

notification.title: KinBridge: Ibu Sri may need a check-in
notification.body: During today's conversation, Ibu Sri had difficulty recalling a core family memory. She is calm and the companion is with her. Tap to view details or call now.

disclaimer: Early screening signal only. Not a medical diagnosis. Consult a healthcare professional for clinical assessment.
